name: stress_all_nodes
description: Comprehensive EXPORT stress test: every one of the ~299 UE 5.7 material node types in nodes-ue5.7.json appears at least once, plus 26 official /Engine Material Functions (diverse signatures: zero-input, many-input, multi-output, MaterialAttributes-typed, Texture-typed, StaticBool-typed) and one local sibling MaterialFunction. Every node is wired (no orphans) and funnels into the single MaterialOutput, whose 15 attribute pins are all driven. Preserves emitter edge cases: float extremes (1e-7 / 1e21 / negatives), special characters in Custom.Code/Description, comment text and a NamedReroute name, a deep linear chain, high fan-out, a deliberate duplicate-into-OUT:BaseColor (dup-drop warning), ComponentMask/AppendVector channel masks, heavy Named Reroute usage, the Make->Set->Get->Break MaterialAttributes chain, and the dynamic-pin nodes SetMaterialAttributes/GetMaterialAttributes/LandscapeLayerBlend. NOTE: intentionally surfaces the auto-collect, local-MF auto-link, and dup-drop warnings.

comments.text: Edge cases: float extremes \ special chars "x" \ deep chain \ fan-out \ masks
Named Reroute "stress" — decls + usages \ heavy fan-out
